titleStmt.title: SII 7.390: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 390. (A.R. No. 181-D of 1901). ON ANOTHER SIDE OF THE SAME SLAB.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
citrabhānu saṁvacsaratha bēsāgeyatiṁgaḷu modalāgi maṇigā(¨r)rakēri
ya mudakāḍatiyara beṁmaseṭiyara maga narayinabaḷiya ti(ṁ)mayya
seṭiyaru hosakēriya taṭiya muḍa taradalu tāvu kaṭisida maṭhadali yirisida
gōpinathadēvarige naivēdya dēvatāvinayōgakke biṭa bāḷa catussīmeya vivarā
guṁḍumeya teṁkahāḷiyalū tāvu badda bra(ṁ)hmadāyada mulada bāḷu muḍa
lū bāḷe vasudēvanavaḍara maga gōviṁdanavaḍara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kanakara ba
ḷiyavara geḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu hariva hoḷeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalū baḍagalu kanakara
baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkkalū yi nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittuva gade mu 2 kaḷa mane tō
ṭa saha muḍi 1 Ubhayaṁ mu 3 yī bāḷa kāhute¨rra mu 1 te¨rra kaḷadu Akki mu 10 ma
ttaṁ Ayirōḍiya Alasaya beṭina paḍuva karikeya bayilu tāvu bada mūlada bāḷa
gaḍiya vivara muḍalū sōmanāthadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu theṁkkalu vōkata
na baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hoḷeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa
lū baḍagalu vōkatana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ theṁkkalu yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷa
ge bitū gadde mu 3 yidakke taru mu 3 yidakke teru kaḷa gēṇi Akki mu 8 mataṁ A
yirōḍidaṁḍeya beṭinalu tāvu baddha mūlada bāḷu beṁmacana tārina cathusīme
ya vivara mūḍalu bayilamane kēśakārāṁttara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu ku[¨rmma] kriṣṇahebarana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hariva ho
ḷeyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu AṇiAḍiyavoḍeyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkkalu yi
ṁttī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittuva gadde mu 4Ø yī bāḷa gēṇi teru kaḷadu Ākki mu 24
yi bāḷamēle maṇigarakēriya sōmanata dēvarige naḍava Akki mu 3 nuḷidu suddha gōpi
nāthadēvarige naḍava Akkimā 21 yī baḷige mūḍakereya nīru Aṁttu dēvarige bi
ṭha Akki mu 39 mataṁ kōṭada gramaṇi Aṁṇakāraṁttaru voppi barasikoṭa baḷu tavu badha bra
hmadāyada mulada bāḷu maṇaŪralu dēvasvada bayaloḷage A bāḷa cattusīveya vivara muḍa
lu hariva hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu maṇigārakēriya halara kōṭeyakēriya halara
yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalū paḍuvalu yeraḍu kēriya halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ Acukoṭari
ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Acukoṭariya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ tteṁkkalū yiṁttī catusīmeyiṁdoḷage
bittuva bhumi kumara gade muḍi 4 haḍuvala gade muḍi 3 Ubhāyaṁ gade muḍi 7 . mataṁ mē
lu bayila catussīmeya vivara muḍalu Acukoṭariya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ yaraḍu kēriya gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu yeraḍu kēriya halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu yaraḍu kēriya ha
lara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ vuḍura baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalū yaraḍu kēriya
halara Acukoṭariya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalū yiṁtī catusīmeyavoḷage bituva bumi ke
reya koḷakesaha gade muḍi 15 vubhayaṁ gade muḍi 22 gade kaḷa mana hādi hakkalu
beṭu saha gēṇiyali Akki muḍi 44Ø ge teru dēvasva kaḷadu sudha Aki muḍi 34Ø mudha
kaḍattiya tiṁmaya seṭṭiyara kayyalu pāraṁpaḷiya doḍevāstēvahōḷara maga naraya
ṇa hōḷaru tāvu bada braṁmādāyada mulada bāḷu beṁgareya bailoḷage hoḷe
yiṁdaṁ paḍuva nārāyaṇa hōḷara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga samudradiṁdaṁ muḍalu billaya
seṭṭiya maṭada bageyiṁdaṁ teṁka yi nāluku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gade muḍi 3 mattaṁ mu
ḍa hōha dakṣina bailoḷage nārāyaṇa hēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍaga ku
vuraḷara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ vupādhyara vuppinagarada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yi
nālukku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gade muḍi 1 mataṁ tteṁka mādaṇana bailoḷaga būri
Upādhyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva cuḍahādiya narayaṇahōḷara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍaga narāyaṇa hōḷara būrivupādhyara yibara hādiyiṁ
Lines 43 to 58 are engraved on the top of the stone.daṁ mūḍa tōḍiṁdaṁ teṁka yī nālukku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage ga
dde mū 2 . hāne gade Āṁtu mūru ṭhāvina bāḷigade mu 4 . 5 gadde
yanu biḍāruvāravāgi mūlādi saha kaḍaṁgoṁḍadu bā
ru maṭha pariva¨rtanake saluva doḍḍavaraha gadyāna 300 Ākṣāra
dalu mūnūru varaha yī bāḷige gēṇi Āki mu 25 śrīmatu
hāravuṭuḷaṁjada bayalu nāvu bada naṁma huṭina bāḷa catrusīmeya vi
vara mūḍa kūḍura tirumaṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva timeseṭiyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa
yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bituva gade mū 1 . 0 mataṁ bayalu muḍalu timaseṭi
yara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka kudukūra tirumaṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga pajaṁta
bayaliṁdaṁ mūḍa baḍaga kudukūra tirumaṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yi
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bittuva gade mu 1Ø0 mattaṁ Ārekala hattiraṇa gadeya catusīme
ya vivara muḍa maṇigārakēriya halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka maṇigārakēriya
halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva purusuvaṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa baḍaga nāru bāle
seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yi nāku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage gade mu ... 0 Āṁtu yi mūru
ṭhāvina bāḷu sahavāgi gade mu 3Ø yidake gēṇi Āki mu 12 bāḷiyāḍiya voḷage nā
vu bada bra(ṁ)hmadāyada mulada bāḷa cattusīmeya vivara muḍa cauḷiyakēriThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 7.390 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
